briefing: No setups today. Sitting in cash is the right move — do not force a trade.

watchlist.name: Visa Inc.
watchlist.thesis: Hit 52-week high ($362.13) on Jul 2 — textbook breakout. Up +3% on 0.85x volume. No earnings in next 21 days. Financials sector leader. Need $300+ in account for options to be affordable (ATM calls ~$5-8/sh).
watchlist.watch_for: Account reaches $300+ available capital. Then enter ATM $365C 2-3 weeks out. Confirm momentum holds above $360.
watchlist.day_trade_plan: Not viable at current budget ($132). Revisit when capital > $300.

watchlist.name: Apple Inc.
watchlist.thesis: 2.88% from 52w high ($317.40). Massive +4.71% move on Jul 2 on 0.87x volume. Strong breakout momentum. Options expensive for current budget ($310C = $5.65/sh). Need $300+ in account. Watch for earnings date (likely late July).
watchlist.watch_for: Confirm earnings date — if after Aug 1, safe to trade July expiry. Account needs $300+ for ATM calls. Watch for continued momentum above $305.
watchlist.day_trade_plan: Not viable at current budget ($132). Revisit when capital > $300. Target $315C or $320C for Jul 17 expiry.

watchlist.name: RTX Corp (Raytheon)
watchlist.thesis: 7.18% from 52w high ($214.50). Up +3.82% on Jul 2, vol ratio 1.0x. Defense sector surge (LMT +4.6%, NOC +5.4% same day). Earnings Jul 23 — can only trade Jul 17 expiry or earlier. ATM $200C at $3.73/sh still too expensive at $132 budget.
watchlist.watch_for: Account reaches $400+. Enter $200C or $202.5C for Jul 17 expiry (before earnings Jul 23). Exit by Jul 16 EOD.
watchlist.day_trade_plan: Not viable at current budget. Earnings Jul 23 means Jul 17 expiry only. Need $400 to trade 1 contract properly.

watchlist.name: GE Aerospace
watchlist.thesis: Industrial sector leader. Up +0.7% Jul 2. Earnings Jul 16 — blackout until Jul 17+. After earnings, reassess for Aug expiry calls if momentum holds.
watchlist.watch_for: Earnings Jul 16. After report, check if momentum continues. Then evaluate Aug calls if account > $300.
watchlist.day_trade_plan: BLACKOUT until Jul 17 (earnings Jul 16). Reassess after.
watchlist.signal: ⚠️ EARNINGS BLACKOUT — do not trade until Jul 17.
